title: Create email templates
content:
Home
Documentation
Security
Google Security Operations
Guides
Stay organized with collections
Save and categorize content based on your preferences.
Create email templates
Supported in:
Google secops
SOAR
You can define templates for recurring emails, so that they can be sent by
  scripts and can also be sent automatically with playbooks.
To create a new email template, follow these steps:
Go to
Settings
>
Environments
>
Email templates
.
Click
add
Add
.
In the
Add Email Template
dialog, enter the email message, name, and environment.
Click
Add
.
Need more help?
Get answers from Community members and Google SecOps professionals.
